name: Sylvan Sagequoia
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>羅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ら</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>賢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>樹</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> シャーマン
desc: When a "Sylvan" monster is sent to the Graveyard (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. Once per turn: You can excavate the top card of your Deck, and if it is a Plant-Type monster, send it to the Graveyard. Otherwise, place it on the bottom of your Deck. If this card is excavated from the Deck and sent to the Graveyard by a card effect: You can target 1 "Sylvan" Spell/Trap Card in your Graveyard; add that target to your hand.
mnst_eff: When a "Sylvan" monster is sent to the Graveyard (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. Once per turn: You can excavate the top card of your Deck, and if it is a Plant-Type monster, send it to the Graveyard. Otherwise, place it on the bottom of your Deck. If this card is excavated from the Deck and sent to the Graveyard by a card effect: You can target 1 "Sylvan" Spell/Trap Card in your Graveyard; add that target to your hand.
eff: When a "Sylvan" monster is sent to the Graveyard (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. sets.set: Premium Gold: Return of the Bling

action: Activates if other cards are sent to the Graveyard
Sends excavated cards to the Graveyard
Sends from the top of your Deck to your Graveyard
Places excavated cards on the bottom of the Deck
Places cards from the player's Deck on the bottom of the Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
